---
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
---
# --- installation packages
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cran.rstudio.com"))

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```



```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(ggridges)    # github.com/wilkelab/ggridges    [REF-5]
library(patchwork)   # github.com/thomasp85/patchwork  [REF-6]
library(viridis)     # github.com/sjmgarnier/viridis   [REF-7]
library(ggrepel)     # github.com/slowkow/ggrepel
library(moments)
library(sf)          # github.com/r-spatial/sf         [REF-1]
library(leaflet)     # github.com/rstudio/leaflet      [REF-8]
library(tmap)        # github.com/r-tmap/tmap          [REF-4]
library(gganimate)   # github.com/thomasp85/gganimate  [REF-3]
library(gifski)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(moments)
library(car) 
library(knitr)
library(dunn.test)

```



# --- Thème global -----------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
theme_biodiv <- theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15, color = "#1a3a4a"),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(color = "#4a6e7a", size = 11),
    plot.caption    = element_text(color = "grey50", size = 8, hjust = 0),
    axis.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1a3a4a"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

theme_set(theme_biodiv)

palette_phylum <- c("Arthropoda" = "#2196F3",
                    "Cnidaria"   = "#FF7043",
                    "Chordata"   = "#66BB6A")

palette_infra <- c("oil"           = "#B71C1C",
                   "wind"          = "#1B5E20",
                   "possible_oil"  = "#E57373",
                   "probable_oil"  = "#EF9A9A",
                   "possible_wind" = "#81C784",
                   "probable_wind" = "#C8E6C9",
                   "unknown"       = "#9E9E9E")

dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)
cat("✅ Configuration terminée.\n")
```

# ================================================================
# SECTION 1 : IMPORT & NETTOYAGE
# ================================================================

```{r}
PATH_U <- "SQL requettes/univarier/"
PATH_B <- "SQL requettes/bivarier/"
PATH_Q <- "SQL requettes/enrichissement/"  # dossier pour les nouveaux CSV

u1_annees  <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U1 Années.csv"),        show_col_types = FALSE)
u2_port    <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U2 port.csv"),           show_col_types = FALSE)
u3_infra   <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U3 infra.csv"),          show_col_types = FALSE)
u4_phylum  <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U4 representation phylum.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
u5_stats_p <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U5 Stats port.csv"),     show_col_types = FALSE)
u6_stats_i <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U6 Stat infra.csv"),     show_col_types = FALSE)
u7_nb      <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_U, "U7 nb port et infra.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

b1_dist_p   <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_B, "B1 DistanceP par phylum.csv"),  show_col_types = FALSE)
b2_dist_i   <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_B, "B2 DistantI par phylum.csv"),   show_col_types = FALSE)
b3_phylum_p <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_B, "B3 phylum ET par classe de distance au port.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
b6_temporal <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_B, "B6  distance moyenne port et offshore par année.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
b7_scatter  <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_B, "B07.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

q1_geo     <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "Q1.csv"),          show_col_types = FALSE)
q2_port    <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "q2 port.csv"),     show_col_types = FALSE)
q2_infra   <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "q2 infra.csv"),    show_col_types = FALSE)
q3_richesse<- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "q3.csv"),          show_col_types = FALSE)
q4_temporal<- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "q4.csv"),          show_col_types = FALSE)
q5_profond <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "q5.csv"),          show_col_types = FALSE)
top_ports  <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "top 20 port.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
top_infra  <- read_csv(paste0(PATH_Q, "top infra.csv"),   show_col_types = FALSE)
```

# --- Nettoyage et préparation des données -----------------------------------

```{r}

# On force les classes de distance en entiers pour que les axes soient propres
u2_port$classe_distance_port     <- as.integer(u2_port$classe_distance_port)
u3_infra$classe_distance_infra   <- as.integer(u3_infra$classe_distance_infra)
b3_phylum_p$classe_distance_port <- as.integer(b3_phylum_p$classe_distance_port)

# On range les données de diversité par distance
q2_port  <- q2_port  %>% mutate(classe_distance_port = as.integer(classe_distance_port)) %>% arrange(classe_distance_port)
q2_infra <- q2_infra %>% mutate(classe_distance_infra = as.integer(classe_distance_infra)) %>% arrange(classe_distance_infra)

# Préparation de la table principale Q1 (GPS et Phylums)
q1_geo <- q1_geo %>%
  mutate(
    latitude  = as.numeric(latitude),
    longitude = as.numeric(longitude),
    # Fixer l'ordre des phylums pour les légendes du rapport
    phylum    = factor(phylum, levels = c("Arthropoda", "Cnidaria", "Chordata")),
    year      = as.integer(year),
    
    # On traduit les types d'infrastructures en français pour les graphiques
    type_infra_clean = case_when(
      infra_la_plus_proche == "wind" ~ "Éolien",
      infra_la_plus_proche == "oil"  ~ "Pétrolier",
      infra_la_plus_proche %in% c("possible_oil", "probable_oil") ~ "Pétrolier (probable)",
      infra_la_plus_proche %in% c("possible_wind", "probable_wind") ~ "Éolien (probable)",
      TRUE ~ "Inconnu"
    )
  ) %>%
  # Suppression des lignes sans coordonnées (inutilisables sur carte)
  filter(!is.na(latitude), !is.na(longitude))

# --- Filtre temporel (Arrêt à 2023) -----------------------------------------
# On coupe à 2023 car les données SQL montrent que 2024/2025 sont incomplètes
q1_complet <- q1_geo      %>% filter(year <= 2023)
q4_complet <- q4_temporal %>% filter(year <= 2023)
b6_complet <- b6_temporal %>% filter(year <= 2023)

# Vérification finale du volume de données
cat(sprintf("✅ C'est bon : %s observations prêtes à l'analyse\n", 
            format(nrow(q1_geo), big.mark = " ")))
```
# ============================================================================
# SECTION 2 : ANALYSE UNIVARIÉE
# ============================================================================

```{r}
# --- U-01 : Distribution temporelle ----------------------------------------
u1_complet <- u1_annees %>% filter(year <= 2023)

fig_u01 <- ggplot(u1_complet, aes(x = factor(year), y = nb_observations)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = nb_observations), color = "white", width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label_number(big.mark = " ")(nb_observations)),
            vjust = -0.4, size = 3, color = "#1a3a4a") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma", guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = " "),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  labs(title    = "U-01 · Distribution temporelle des observations (2010–2023)",
       subtitle = "Tendance décroissante visible à partir de 2016",
       x = "Année", y = "Nombre d'observations",
       caption = "Source : Requête SQL U1 | Années partielles 2024–2026 exclues")
ggsave("figures/U01_distribution_temporelle.png", fig_u01,
       width = 11, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

cat("  → Figures U-01 esauvegardées\n")

```

```{r}
# --- U-04 : Représentation des phylums (camembert)
u4_phylum <- u4_phylum %>%
  arrange(desc(phylum)) %>%
  mutate(pct   = nb_observations / sum(nb_observations) * 100,
         label = paste0(phylum, "\n", comma(nb_observations, big.mark = " "),
                        "\n(", round(pct, 1), "%)"),
         # Calcul de la position pour que les étiquettes ne se chevauchent pas
         ypos = cumsum(pct) - 0.5 * pct)

fig_u04 <- ggplot(u4_phylum, aes(x = "", y = pct, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_col(width = 1, color = "white", linewidth = 1.2) +
  coord_polar("y", start = 0) +
  
  # REMPLACEMENT : geom_label_repel au lieu de geom_text pour la lisibilité
  geom_label_repel(aes(y = ypos, label = label), 
                   nudge_x = 0.8, size = 3.8, fontface = "bold", 
                   show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.9) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
  
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "right", 
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, size = 15, color = "#1a3a4a"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5, color = "#4a6e7a")) +
  
  labs(title    = "U-04 · Représentation des phylums",
       subtitle = paste("N total =", comma(sum(u4_phylum$nb_observations),
                                           big.mark = " ")),
       caption = "Note : Les étiquettes sont déportées pour faciliter la lecture des petits groupes")

ggsave("figures/U04_representation_phylum.png", fig_u04,
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

cat("  → fIGURE U-04 sauvegardées\n")
```
```{r}
# --- U-02 : Distribution des classes de distance aux ports ----------------

fig_u02 <- ggplot(u2_port, aes(x = factor(classe_distance_port), y = nb_observations)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2196F3", color = "white", alpha = 0.8, width = 0.8) +
  
  # Ajout des chiffres au-dessus des barres pour la précision
  geom_text(aes(label = format(nb_observations, big.mark = " ")),
            vjust = -0.5, size = 3, color = "#1a3a4a", fontface = "bold") +
  
  labs(title    = "U-02 · Répartition par classes de distance aux ports",
       subtitle = "Échelle de 1 (éloigné) à 10 (très proche)",
       x = "Classe de proximité", 
       y = "Nombre d'observations",
       caption = "Source : Données traitées SQL | Classes 1 à 10") +
  
  # Nettoyage de l'axe Y pour la lisibilité
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = " "), 
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))

ggsave("figures/U02_distrib_classes_port.png", fig_u02, 
       width = 11, height = 5, dpi = 300)

cat("  → Figure U-02 (Classes de distance) sauvegardée avec succès\n")
```
# ============================================================================
# SECTION 3 : ANALYSE BIVARIÉE
# ============================================================================

```{r}
# --- B-01/02 : Distance par phylum ------------------------------------------
fig_b01 <- ggplot(b1_dist_p,
                  aes(x = reorder(phylum, moyenne), y = moyenne, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = pmax(0, moyenne - ecart_type),
                    ymax = moyenne + ecart_type),
                width = 0.2, linewidth = 0.9, color = "#1a3a4a") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(moyenne, 2), " km")),
            vjust = -2.8, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22)),
                     labels = label_number(suffix = " km")) +
  labs(title   = "B-01 · Distance moyenne au port par phylum",
       subtitle = "Arthropoda significativement plus éloigné (moy. 12.6 km vs 3.8–4.9 km)",
       x = "Phylum", y = "Distance moyenne (km)",
       caption = "Barres d'erreur = ± écart-type | B1 : agrégation SQL par phylum") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave("figures/B01_distance_port_phylum.png", fig_b01,
       width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```

#: Q2 Ratio de diversité par classe de distance -----------------

```{r} 
#port

fig_q2_port <- ggplot(q2_port, aes(x = classe_distance_port, y = ratio_diversite)) +
  
  geom_line(color = "#2196F3", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  
  geom_point(color = "#2196F3", size = 3) +
  
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = paste0(round(ratio_diversite * 100, 1), "%\n", 
                                     format(nb_observations, big.mark = " "), " obs.")),
                  size = 3.5, 
                  lineheight = 0.8,
                  color = "#1a3a4a", 
                  fontface = "bold",
                  nudge_y = 0.02,
                  segment.color = NA) + 
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(), 
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.2))) +
  
  labs(title    = "Q2-PORT · Diversité spécifique et Effort d'échantillonnage",
       subtitle  = "Le ratio chute en classe 9 malgré un volume d'observations massif",
       x = "Classe de distance au port (1 = plus proche)",
       y = "Ratio de diversité (%)",
       caption = "Note : Le nombre d'observations (obs.) indique la robustesse de chaque point.") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1a3a4a"),
        plot.subtitle   = element_text(color = "grey40"))

ggsave("figures/Q2_port.png", fig_q2_port, 
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```

```{r}
# Infra
fig_q2_infra <- ggplot(q2_infra, aes(x = classe_distance_infra, y = ratio_diversite)) +
  
  geom_line(color = "#FF7043", linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.6) +
  
  geom_point(color = "#FF7043", size = 3) +
  
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = paste0(round(ratio_diversite * 100, 1), "%\n", 
                                     format(nb_observations, big.mark = " "), " obs.")),
                  size = 3.5, 
                  lineheight = 0.8,
                  color = "#1a3a4a", 
                  fontface = "bold",
                  nudge_y = 0.003,
                  segment.color = NA) + 
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(), 
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.2))) +
  
  labs(title    = "Q2-INFRA · Diversité et Proximité des Infrastructures",
       subtitle  = "Analyse par rapport aux plateformes et parcs éoliens",
       x = "Classe de distance à l'infrastructure (1 = plus proche)",
       y = "Ratio de diversité (%)") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

ggsave("figures/Q2_infra.png", fig_q2_infra, 
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("  → figure generé\n")


```
```{r}
fig_q2_port_final <- fig_q2_port + labs(title = "A · PROXIMITÉ DES PORTS")
fig_q2_infra_final <- fig_q2_infra + labs(title = "B · PROXIMITÉ DES INFRASTRUCTURES OFFSHORE")


fig_q2_comparaison <- fig_q2_port_final / fig_q2_infra_final

fig_q2_comparaison <- fig_q2_comparaison + 
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Comparaison du Ratio de Diversité Spécifique",
    subtitle = "Analyse des gradients de biodiversité selon l'anthropisation (1 = zone la plus proche)",
    caption = "Source : Données EMODnet | Analyse bivariée Q2",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

ggsave("figures/Q2_ratio_diversite_FINAL.png", 
       fig_q2_comparaison,
       width = 12, 
       height = 14, 
       dpi = 300, 
       bg = "white")

cat("  → figure generé\n")
```


```{r}
# --- Q5 : Profondeur par classe de distance ---------------------------------
fig_q5_clean <- ggplot(q5_profond, aes(x = classe_distance_port)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = profondeur_moyenne - profondeur_ecart_type,
                  ymax = profondeur_moyenne + profondeur_ecart_type),
              fill = "#90CAF9", alpha = 0.3) +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = profondeur_moyenne), color = "#1565C0", 
            linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.8) +
  
  geom_point(aes(y = profondeur_moyenne), color = "#1565C0", size = 3) +
  
  geom_text_repel(aes(y = profondeur_moyenne,
                      label = paste0(round(profondeur_moyenne, 0), " m\n", 
                                     format(nb_observations, big.mark = " "), " obs.")),
                  size = 3.5, 
                  lineheight = 0.8,
                  color = "#1a3a4a", 
                  fontface = "bold",
                  nudge_y = -18,
                  segment.color = NA) + 
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  scale_y_reverse(labels = label_number(suffix = " m")) + 
  
  labs(title    = "Q5 · Profil bathymétrique par classe de distance",
       subtitle  = "Moyenne de profondeur (ligne) et variabilité (ruban bleu)",
       x = "Classe de distance au port (1 = plus proche)",
       y = "Profondeur (mètres)",
       caption = "Le ruban représente l'écart-type. La classe 1 montre une très forte hétérogénéité.") +
  
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#1a3a4a"))

ggsave("figures/Q5_profondeur_complet_clean.png", fig_q5_clean, 
       width = 11, height = 7, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```

```{r}
# --- Top infrastructures ---------------------------------------------------
top_infra <- top_infra %>%
  mutate(type_fr = case_when(
    type_infrastructure == "oil"           ~ "Pétrolier",
    type_infrastructure == "wind"          ~ "Éolien",
    type_infrastructure == "possible_oil"  ~ "Pétrolier (possible)",
    type_infrastructure == "probable_oil"  ~ "Pétrolier (probable)",
    type_infrastructure == "possible_wind" ~ "Éolien (possible)",
    type_infrastructure == "probable_wind" ~ "Éolien (probable)",
    TRUE ~ "Inconnu"
  ),
  type_fr = fct_reorder(type_fr, total_observations))

fig_infra_type <- ggplot(top_infra, aes(x = type_fr, y = total_observations,
                                        fill = type_infrastructure)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(label_number(big.mark = " ")(total_observations),
                               "\n", distance_moyenne_km, " km")),
            hjust = -0.05, size = 3.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_infra) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = " "),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.35))) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title    = "Type d'infrastructure offshore & observations associées",
       subtitle  = "Les plateformes pétrolières et inconnues concentrent l'essentiel des observations",
       x = NULL, y = "Nombre d'observations",
       caption = "Note : 'inconnu' = infrastructure non classifiée dans la BDD") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
ggsave("figures/infra_type_observations.png", fig_infra_type,
       width = 11, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

cat("  → figure generé\n")
```


```{r}
# --- B-07 : Scatter + Spearman (B7 dataset) --------------------------------
b7_scatter <- b7_scatter %>%
  mutate(phylum = factor(phylum, levels = c("Arthropoda", "Cnidaria", "Chordata")))

b7_stats <- b7_scatter %>%
  group_by(phylum) %>%
  summarize(
    rho = cor.test(distance_port_min, distance_infra_min, method = "spearman")$estimate,
    p_val = cor.test(distance_port_min, distance_infra_min, method = "spearman")$p.value
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = sprintf("Spearman ρ = %.3f\np = %.2e", rho, p_val))

# 3. GÉNÉRATION DU GRAPHIQUE
fig_b07 <- ggplot(b7_scatter, aes(x = log1p(distance_port_min), 
                                  y = log1p(distance_infra_min), 
                                  color = phylum)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.8) +
  geom_density_2d(linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.15) +
  
  # Utilisation du tableau de stats pour les étiquettes par facette
  geom_text(data = b7_stats, aes(label = label), 
            x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, 
            size = 3.5, color = "grey30", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
  facet_wrap(~phylum) +
  
  labs(title    = "B-07 · Relation log(dist. port) ~ log(dist. infra) par Phylum",
       subtitle  = "Coefficients de Spearman calculés individuellement par groupe",
       x = "log(1 + distance port) km",
       y = "log(1 + distance infra) km",
       caption = "Transformation log1p | Contours de densité par geom_density_2d") +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12))

ggsave("figures/B07_scatter_log_FINAL.png", fig_b07, 
       width = 12, height = 5, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```


# ===============================================================
# SECTION 4 : ANALYSE TEMPORELLE 
# ===============================================================

```{r}
# Panneau A : Bleu + Vert
data_A <- q4_complet %>% filter(phylum %in% c("Arthropoda", "Chordata"))
# Panneau B : Bleu + Orange
data_B <- q4_complet %>% filter(phylum %in% c("Arthropoda", "Cnidaria"))

creer_plot <- function(data) {
  ggplot(data, aes(x = year, y = distance_port_moyenne, color = phylum)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.1, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = paste0(format(nb_observations, big.mark = " "), " obs.")),
                    size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2023) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = " km"), limits = c(0, 22)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(x = "Année", y = "Distance (km)", color = "Phylum")
}

p1 <- creer_plot(data_A) + labs(title = "Comparaison : Arthropoda & Chordata")
p2 <- creer_plot(data_B) + labs(title = "Comparaison : Arthropoda & Cnidaria")

fig_finale <- p1 / p2 + 
  plot_annotation(title = "Q4 · Analyse comparative de la distance au port",
                  subtitle = "Séparation des phyla pour une meilleure lisibilité")

ggsave("figures/Q4_distance_double_panneau.png", fig_finale, width = 12, height = 12, dpi = 300)
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```


```{r}
fig_q4_rich_v2 <- ggplot(q4_complet, aes(x = year, y = nb_especes_distinctes, color = phylum)) +

  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number()) + 
  
  scale_color_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2023) +
  
  labs(title    = "Q4 · Évolution de la richesse spécifique (Échelle Log)",
       subtitle = "Comparaison des tendances malgré les différences de volume",
       x = "Année", y = "Nb espèces (Log10)",
       color = "Phylum") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("figures/Q4_richesse_log.png", fig_q4_rich_v2, width = 12, height = 6)
cat("  → figure generé\n")

```

# ===============================================================
# SECTION 5 : ANIMATION GGANIMATE [REF-3]
# ===============================================================

 
```{r}
# --- Animation : distance au port par phylum, année par année 
# (Arthropoda uniquement pour la lisibilité)
q4_arthro <- q4_complet %>%
  filter(phylum == "Arthropoda")

anim_q4 <- ggplot(q4_arthro, aes(x = year, y = distance_port_moyenne)) +
  geom_area(fill = "#BBDEFB", alpha = 0.3, stat = "identity") + 
  geom_line(color = "#2196F3", linewidth = 1.8, lineend = "round", stat = "identity") +
  geom_point(aes(size = nb_especes_distinctes), color = "#2196F3", alpha = 0.9) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2010:2023) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = " km"),
                     limits = c(9, 19)) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Nb espèces", range = c(3, 12)) +
  labs(title    = "Distance moyenne au port — Arthropoda",
       subtitle = "Année : {frame_along}",
       x = "Année", y = "Distance moyenne (km)",
       caption = "[REF-3 gganimate] | Q4 : GROUP BY year, phylum") +
  transition_reveal(year) + 
  ease_aes("cubic-in-out")
 
gif_anim <- "figures/animation_distance_temporelle.gif"
if (!file.exists(gif_anim)) {
  animate(anim_q4, nframes = 80, fps = 10,
          width = 900, height = 500,
          renderer = gifski_renderer(gif_anim))
}
cat("  → Animation GIF disponible\n")
```
 
# ===============================================================
# SECTION 6 : ANALYSE SPATIALE — CARTE LEAFLET RÉELLE [REF-8]
# ==============================================================
 
 
```{r}
cat("\n🗺️  ANALYSE SPATIALE — COORDONNÉES GPS RÉELLES\n")
 
# --- Sous-échantillon pour la carte (performances) --------------------------
set.seed(42)
q1_sample <- q1_geo %>%
  group_by(phylum) %>%
  group_modify(~ slice_sample(.x, n = min(2000, nrow(.x)))) %>%
  ungroup()
 
# --- Palettes et popups -----------------------------------------------------
pal_phylum <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("#2196F3", "#FF7043", "#66BB6A"),
  domain  = c("Arthropoda", "Cnidaria", "Chordata")
)
 
q1_sample <- q1_sample %>%
  mutate(popup_html = paste0(
    "<b>Phylum :</b> ", phylum, "<br>",
    "<b>Espèce :</b> <i>", espece, "</i><br>",
    "<b>Année :</b> ", year, "<br>",
    "<b>Dist. port :</b> ", round(distance_port_min, 2), " km — ",
    port_le_plus_proche, "<br>",
    "<b>Infra. proche :</b> ", infra_la_plus_proche
  ))
 
# --- Top 20 ports avec icônes --------------------------------------------
ports_sf <- top_ports %>%
  rename(NomPort = NomPort)
 
# --- Carte principale -------------------------------------------------------
carte <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(preferCanvas = TRUE)) %>%
 
  # Fonds de carte
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron,    group = "CartoDB Positron") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.OceanBasemap,   group = "ESRI Océan") %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap,        group = "OpenStreetMap") %>%
 
  # ── Observations biologiques ──
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = q1_sample,
    lng         = ~longitude,
    lat         = ~latitude,
    color       = ~pal_phylum(phylum),
    radius      = 5,
    fillOpacity = 0.6,
    opacity     = 0.9,
    weight      = 0.5,
    popup       = ~popup_html,
    label       = ~paste(phylum, "–", espece),
    group       = "Observations biologiques"
  ) %>%
 
  # ── Top 20 Ports ──
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = ports_sf,
    lng         = ~longitude,
    lat         = ~latitude,
    color       = "#FFD700",
    fillColor   = "#FFA000",
    radius      = ~rescale(nb_observations_associees, to = c(6, 18)),
    fillOpacity = 0.85,
    opacity     = 1,
    weight      = 2,
    popup       = ~paste0(
      "<b>⚓ ", NomPort, "</b><br>",
      "Observations associées : <b>", comma(nb_observations_associees), "</b><br>",
      "Distance moyenne : <b>", distance_moyenne_km, " km</b>"
    ),
    label       = ~NomPort,
    group       = "Ports (Top 20)"
  ) %>%
 
  # ── Légende phylums ──
  addLegend(
    position   = "bottomright",
    pal        = pal_phylum,
    values     = q1_sample$phylum,
    title      = "Phylum",
    opacity    = 0.9
  ) %>%
 
  # ── Contrôle des couches ──
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups    = c("CartoDB Positron", "ESRI Océan", "OpenStreetMap"),
    overlayGroups = c("Observations biologiques", "Ports (Top 20)"),
    options       = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) %>%
 
  # ── Outils ──
  addMiniMap(toggleDisplay = TRUE, minimized = FALSE) %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "bottomleft") %>%
  addMeasure(position = "topleft",
             primaryLengthUnit = "kilometers") %>%
 
  # Centrage sur la zone d'étude
  setView(lng = 5, lat = 48, zoom = 4)
 
saveWidget(carte, "figures/carte_biodiversite_marine.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
cat("  → Carte interactive HTML sauvegardée\n")
```

```{r}
# --- Carte statique tmap [REF-4] --------------------------------------------

obs_sf   <- st_as_sf(q1_sample,  coords = c("longitude","latitude"), crs = 4326)
ports_sf_geo <- st_as_sf(top_ports, coords = c("longitude","latitude"), crs = 4326)
 
tmap_mode("plot")
 
carte_statique <- tm_shape(obs_sf) +
  tm_dots(
    fill       = "phylum",
    fill.scale = tm_scale_categorical(
      values = c("Arthropoda" = "#2196F3",
                 "Cnidaria"   = "#FF7043",
                 "Chordata"   = "#66BB6A")
    ),
    fill.legend = tm_legend(title = "Phylum"),
    size  = 0.08,
    col   = NA
  ) +
  tm_shape(ports_sf_geo) +
  tm_symbols(
    fill  = "gold",
    col   = "#FFA000",
    size  = "nb_observations_associees",
    shape = 23,
    col.legend  = tm_legend_hide(),
    size.legend = tm_legend(title = "Nb obs. (port)")
  ) +
  tm_title("Distribution spatiale de la biodiversité marine\nAtlantique NE / Méditerranée / Mer du Nord") +
  tm_scalebar(position = c("left", "bottom"), breaks = c(0, 250, 500)) +
  tm_compass(position = c("right", "top"), size = 2) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    frame          = FALSE,
    bg.color       = "#F0F8FF"
  )
 
tmap_save(carte_statique, "figures/carte_statique_tmap.png",
          width = 3000, height = 2000, dpi = 300)
cat("  → figure generé\n")
```


Partie inference :

```{r}
stats_kw <- b7_scatter %>%
  group_by(phylum) %>%
  summarise(N          = n(),
            Mediane    = round(median(distance_port_min), 2),
            Moyenne    = round(mean(distance_port_min), 2),
            Ecart_type = round(sd(distance_port_min), 2),
            .groups    = "drop")
print(kable(stats_kw, format = "simple"))
```


```{r}
#============================================================================
# TEST 1 — KRUSKAL-WALLIS : dist_port ~ phylum
# ============================================================================
# H₀ : distributions identiques entre les phylums
# H₁ : au moins un phylum diffère
# Justification : hétéroscédasticité sévère (ratio variances = 54.5,
#                 Levene p < 0.001) → ANOVA non applicable
# ============================================================================
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("TEST 1 · KRUSKAL-WALLIS\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
 
# --- Conditions d'application -----------------------------------------------
var_arthro   <- var(b7_scatter$distance_port_min[b7_scatter$phylum == "Arthropoda"])
var_cnidaria <- var(b7_scatter$distance_port_min[b7_scatter$phylum == "Cnidaria"])
levene_res   <- leveneTest(distance_port_min ~ phylum, data = b7_scatter)
 
cat(sprintf("Ratio des variances  : %.1f  (seuil : < 4)\n", var_arthro / var_cnidaria))
cat(sprintf("Levene p-value       : %.2e  → hétéroscédasticité confirmée\n",
            levene_res$`Pr(>F)`[1]))
cat("→ ANOVA non applicable. Kruskal-Wallis retenu.\n\n")

```
```{r}
# --- Test -------------------------------------------------------------------
kw_res <- kruskal.test(distance_port_min ~ phylum, data = b7_scatter)
cat(sprintf("\nKruskal-Wallis : chi²(%d) = %.2f, p = %.2e\n",
            kw_res$parameter, kw_res$statistic, kw_res$p.value))
cat("✔ H₀ rejetée : les phylums se distribuent différemment par rapport au port.\n\n")
 
# --- Post-hoc Dunn ----------------------------------------------------------
cat("Post-hoc Dunn (Bonferroni) :\n")
dunn.test(b7_scatter$distance_port_min, b7_scatter$phylum,
          method = "bonferroni", altp = TRUE)
```
```{r}
# --- Figure -----------------------------------------------------------------
fig_kw <- ggplot(b7_scatter, aes(x = phylum, y = distance_port_min, fill = phylum)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.3, color = NA, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.25, outlier.shape = 21, outlier.size = 1,
               outlier.alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(data = stats_kw,
            aes(y = Mediane, label = paste0("Mdn = ", Mediane, " km")),
            vjust = -1.3, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("segment", x = 1, xend = 2, y = 38, yend = 38,
           color = "#B71C1C", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 39.5,
           label = "***", size = 7, color = "#B71C1C") +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = 35,
           label = sprintf("chi²(1) = %.1f\np < 2.2e-16", kw_res$statistic),
           size = 3.3, color = "#B71C1C", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palette_phylum) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_number(suffix = " km")) +
  labs(title   = "Test 1 - Kruskal-Wallis : distance au port par phylum",
       subtitle = "*** Difference hautement significative (p < 0.001)",
       x       = "Phylum",
       y       = "Distance minimale au port (km)",
       caption = sprintf("N = %d obs. | Kruskal-Wallis + post-hoc Dunn (Bonferroni)",
                         nrow(b7_scatter))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position  = "none",
        plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
 
ggsave("figures/T1_kruskal_wallis.png", fig_kw,
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("\n-> Figure T1 sauvegardee.\n")
```
```{r}
# ============================================================================
# TEST 2 — RÉGRESSION LINÉAIRE : ratio_diversite ~ classe_distance_port
# ============================================================================
# H₀ : β₁ = 0 (la distance n'explique pas la diversité spécifique)
# H₁ : β₁ ≠ 0
# Modèle : ratio_diversite = β₀ + β₁ × classe_distance_port + ε
# ============================================================================
cat("\n══════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("TEST 2 · RÉGRESSION LINÉAIRE\n")
cat("══════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
 
lm1     <- lm(ratio_diversite ~ classe_distance_port, data = q2_port)
lm1_sum <- summary(lm1)
p_val   <- pf(lm1_sum$fstatistic[1], lm1_sum$fstatistic[2],
               lm1_sum$fstatistic[3], lower.tail = FALSE)
 
cat(sprintf("Equation : ratio = %.4f + %.4f x classe_distance_port\n",
            coef(lm1)[1], coef(lm1)[2]))
cat(sprintf("R2        = %.4f  (%.1f%% de variance expliquee)\n",
            lm1_sum$r.squared, lm1_sum$r.squared * 100))
cat(sprintf("R2 ajuste = %.4f\n", lm1_sum$adj.r.squared))
cat(sprintf("F(%d,%d)   = %.2f,  p = %.4f\n",
            lm1_sum$fstatistic[2], lm1_sum$fstatistic[3],
            lm1_sum$fstatistic[1], p_val))
cat("\nCoefficients :\n")
print(kable(round(coef(summary(lm1)), 5), format = "simple"))
```


```{r}
# --- Figure : droite de régression + résidus --------------------------------
q2_pred <- q2_port %>%
  mutate(pred  = predict(lm1),
         lower = predict(lm1, interval = "confidence")[, "lwr"],
         upper = predict(lm1, interval = "confidence")[, "upr"])
 
fig_reg <- ggplot(q2_pred, aes(x = classe_distance_port, y = ratio_diversite)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), fill = "#BBDEFB", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pred), color = "#1565C0",
            linewidth = 1.4, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(size = nb_observations), color = "#2196F3",
             fill = "#2196F3", shape = 21, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("Cl.", classe_distance_port)),
            vjust = -1.1, size = 2.8, color = "#1a3a4a") +
  annotate("text", x = 7.5, y = 0.008,
           label = sprintf("R2 = %.3f\nb1 = +%.4f\np = %.3f",
                           lm1_sum$r.squared, coef(lm1)[2], p_val),
           size = 3.5, color = "#B71C1C", fontface = "bold") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 0.1)) +
  scale_size_continuous(labels = label_number(big.mark = " "),
                        name = "Nb obs.", range = c(3, 10)) +
  labs(title   = "Test 2 - Regression lineaire : ratio diversite ~ classe distance port",
       subtitle = sprintf("ratio = %.4f + %.4f x classe | IC 95%% en bleu",
                          coef(lm1)[1], coef(lm1)[2]),
       x       = "Classe de distance au port (1 = plus proche)",
       y       = "Ratio de diversite specifique",
       caption = "N = 10 classes | ratio = nb_especes_distinctes / nb_observations") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position  = "right")
 
fig_residus <- ggplot(data.frame(fitted = fitted(lm1), res = residuals(lm1)),
                      aes(x = fitted, y = res)) +
  geom_point(color = "#2196F3", size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "#B71C1C") +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "#FF7043",
              linewidth = 1, span = 1) +
  labs(title = "Analyse des residus",
       x     = "Valeurs ajustees",
       y     = "Residus") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
 
fig_test2 <- fig_reg / fig_residus + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1))
ggsave("figures/T2_regression.png", fig_test2,
       width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
cat("-> Figure T2 sauvegardee.\n")
```

```{r}
u5 <- read.csv("SQL requettes/univarier/U5 Stats port.csv")
u6 <- read.csv("SQL requettes/univarier/U6 Stat infra.csv")

print(u5)
print(u6)
```
